about.text:
About Us :: Wymbs Engineering
info@wymbsengineering.com
+44 (0) 1625 575154
About Us
Wymbs Engineering Ltd
is a family-owned UK business founded in the early 1980s. Based near Manchester—the company has evolved to become a recognized leader in the design and manufacture of high‑precision processing equipment.
Today, the company’s team of 30 skilled and dedicated employees continues to deliver bespoke solutions with a strong emphasis on in‑house design and manufacturing, harnessing advanced 3D CAD and multi-axis CNC production.
At the core of Wymbs Engineering is its specialty in advanced depositing technology
, especially pressurised manifold depositing systems that handle light, aerated, delicate, and un‑aerated masses with pinpoint accuracy. Their capabilities extend across volumetric depositing, sheeting and extruding manifolds, a range of depositing  drive systems to suit any environment, and cream processing lines tailored for chilled patisserie products like doughnuts and chocolate éclairs
These design solutions are engineered to deliver centre‑filled deposits, multi‑product simultaneous depositing, hopperless systems, and retrofit adaptability onto existing lines. Therefore supporting flexibility, speed, and ease of cleaning for demanding production environments.
Globally minded, quality‑driven
—Wymbs Engineering exports approximately 75–85% of its turnover to markets worldwide. Their reputation is built on exceptional machine performance and tailored innovation, finding clients among some of the world’s leading confectionery and bakery brands. A notable hallmark of their approach is agile problem-solving, creating truly bespoke machinery such as the “burger” marshmallow depositor (a multi-tier, multi-colour centre‑fill system), and custom cream or jam‑injected processing lines—often conceived and tested entirely in-house before being brought into commercial operation, Wymbs can truly become a partner to an end user and help make their product aspirations into reality.
BakedIn Knowledge-
Wymbs prides itself on having a unique set of skills and talents within the business, from process conception to installation we have the skills to deliver.
The Knowledge goal at Wymbs has always been to nurture our growing talent, and identify areas of improvement. With a continuous improvement philosophy, Wymbs never stays still.
